name: text
title: Text Utility Functions
description: Text processing utilities for cleaning and normalising plain-text extracted by Apache Tika and similar tools.

functions.name: parseUnstructured
functions.description: Converts the JSON response body from the Unstructured.io REST API (POST /general/v0/general) into clean plain text for vector embedding. Table elements are reconstructed from their HTML to preserve column context (e.g. DEV/SIT/UAT/PROD environment columns). Footer, Header, Image and PageBreak elements are omitted. Safe to call on empty strings.

functions.name: cleanText
functions.description: Removes Apache Tika extraction artifacts from plain text: strips [image: ...] alt-text tokens, decodes HTML entities, removes control characters, trims whitespace per line, joins short orphaned fragments (table cells), and collapses runs of 3+ blank lines. Safe to call on empty strings (returns "").

functions.name: smartChunk
functions.description: Converts the JSON response from the Unstructured.io REST API into structure-aware text chunks separated by blank lines (\n\n), ready for the VectorDB ingestDocuments activity using chunkStrategy=paragraph. Each chunk carries [Document: ...] [Section: ...] context. Tables are kept atomic with column labels preserved (no orphan cells). Two-column key/value tables also produce a 'Form fields:' digest chunk for high-precision retrieval. Footer/Header/Image/PageBreak elements are dropped.
functions.example:
text.smartChunk(unstructuredJson, "spec.pdf") => "[Document: spec] [Section: Heading]
...

[Document: spec] [Section: Heading]
Table:
Columns: A | B
A: x | B: y"
